---
title: "RespiCast Joint Two-Stage Prospective Forecasts"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    theme: flatly
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)

if (dir.exists("../forecasts/prospective/submission")) {
  root_prefix <- ".."
} else if (dir.exists("forecasts/prospective/submission")) {
  root_prefix <- "."
} else {
  stop("Could not locate forecasts/prospective/submission")
}

sub_dir <- file.path(root_prefix, "forecasts/prospective/submission")
data_file <- file.path(root_prefix, "data/processed/respicast_long_latest.csv")
loc_file <- file.path(root_prefix, "RespiCast-SyndromicIndicators/supporting-files/locations_iso2_codes.csv")

if (!file.exists(data_file)) {
  stop("Canonical data file not found. Run run/run_weekly.sh first.")
}

truth_raw <- read_csv(data_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    truth_date = as.Date(truth_date),
    location = as.character(location),
    target = as.character(target),
    value = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(truth_date), !is.na(value))

loc_map <- if (file.exists(loc_file)) {
  read_csv(loc_file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    transmute(location = as.character(iso2_code), location_name = as.character(location_name))
} else {
  tibble(location = unique(truth_raw$location), location_name = unique(truth_raw$location))
}

scope_locations <- c("AT","BE","CZ","EE","FI","FR","GR","HU","IE","IS","LT","LU","MT","NL","NO","PL","RO")
scope_map <- tibble(location = scope_locations) %>%
  left_join(loc_map, by = "location") %>%
  mutate(location_name = coalesce(location_name, location))
scope_location_names <- scope_map$location_name

if (!("location_name" %in% names(truth_raw))) {
  truth_raw$location_name <- NA_character_
}

truth_raw <- truth_raw %>%
  mutate(location_name = as.character(location_name)) %>%
  left_join(loc_map, by = "location", suffix = c("", "_map")) %>%
  mutate(location_name = coalesce(location_name, location_name_map, location)) %>%
  select(-location_name_map)

forecast_files <- list.files(
  sub_dir,
  pattern = "^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-.+\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
file_info <- file.info(forecast_files)
file_mtime <- setNames(as.numeric(file_info$mtime), forecast_files)

forecast_raw <- bind_rows(lapply(forecast_files, function(path) {
  tryCatch({
    file_origin_date <- as.Date(substr(basename(path), 1, 10))
    read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
      mutate(
        source_file = basename(path),
        origin_date = file_origin_date,
        target_end_date = as.Date(target_end_date),
        location = as.character(location),
        target = as.character(target),
        horizon = as.integer(horizon),
        output_type_id = as.numeric(output_type_id),
        value = as.numeric(value),
        file_mtime = file_mtime[[path]]
      )
  }, error = function(e) {
    NULL
  })
})) %>%
  filter(output_type == "quantile", horizon %in% 1:4) %>%
  filter(!is.na(origin_date), !is.na(target_end_date), !is.na(value)) %>%
  arrange(file_mtime) %>%
  distinct(
    target, origin_date, target_end_date, horizon, location, output_type, output_type_id,
    .keep_all = TRUE
  )

if (nrow(forecast_raw) == 0) {
  stop("No forecast files with quantiles found in forecasts/prospective/submission")
}

forecast_summary <- forecast_raw %>%
  group_by(target, origin_date, location, horizon, target_end_date) %>%
  summarise(
    q025 = value[which.min(abs(output_type_id - 0.025))],
    q25 = value[which.min(abs(output_type_id - 0.25))],
    median = value[which.min(abs(output_type_id - 0.5))],
    q75 = value[which.min(abs(output_type_id - 0.75))],
    q975 = value[which.min(abs(output_type_id - 0.975))],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    q025 = pmin(q025, q25, median, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = pmin(q25, median, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = pmax(q75, median, na.rm = TRUE),
    q975 = pmax(q975, q75, median, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  left_join(loc_map, by = "location") %>%
  mutate(location_name = coalesce(location_name, location))

target_choices <- sort(unique(forecast_summary$target))
default_target <- target_choices[1]

origin_choices_for_target <- function(tgt) {
  dates <- forecast_summary %>% filter(target == tgt) %>% pull(origin_date) %>% unique() %>% sort(decreasing = TRUE)
  as.character(dates)
}

location_choices_for_target <- function(tgt) {
  scope_location_names
}
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Controls

```{r}
selectInput("target_sel", "Target", choices = target_choices, selected = default_target)

fluidRow(
  column(6, actionButton("prev_date", "<- Prev")),
  column(6, actionButton("next_date", "Next ->"))
)

selectInput(
  "origin_sel",
  "Origin Date",
  choices = origin_choices_for_target(default_target),
  selected = origin_choices_for_target(default_target)[1]
)

selectizeInput(
  "loc_sel",
  "Locations",
  choices = location_choices_for_target(default_target),
  selected = location_choices_for_target(default_target),
  multiple = TRUE,
  options = list(placeholder = "Select locations")
)

observeEvent(input$target_sel, {
  dates <- origin_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)
  updateSelectInput(session, "origin_sel", choices = dates, selected = dates[1])

  locs <- location_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)
  updateSelectizeInput(
    session,
    "loc_sel",
    choices = locs,
    selected = locs,
    server = TRUE
  )
})

observeEvent(input$prev_date, {
  dates <- origin_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)
  cur <- input$origin_sel
  idx <- which(dates == cur)
  if (length(idx) == 1 && idx < length(dates)) {
    updateSelectInput(session, "origin_sel", selected = dates[idx + 1])
  }
})

observeEvent(input$next_date, {
  dates <- origin_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)
  cur <- input$origin_sel
  idx <- which(dates == cur)
  if (length(idx) == 1 && idx > 1) {
    updateSelectInput(session, "origin_sel", selected = dates[idx - 1])
  }
})
```

### Summary

```{r}
renderPrint({
  req(input$target_sel, input$origin_sel)
  fc <- forecast_summary %>% filter(target == input$target_sel, origin_date == as.Date(input$origin_sel))
  cat("Target:", input$target_sel, "\n")
  cat("Origin date:", input$origin_sel, "\n")
  cat("Locations in selected forecast:", n_distinct(fc$location), "\n")
  cat("Forecast rows (summary table):", nrow(fc), "\n")
  cat("Available origin dates for this target:", length(origin_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)), "\n")
})
```

Row {data-height=750}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Forecast vs Truth

```{r}
renderPlot({
  req(input$target_sel, input$origin_sel)

  loc_levels <- location_choices_for_target(input$target_sel)
  if (!is.null(input$loc_sel) && length(input$loc_sel) > 0) {
    loc_levels <- intersect(loc_levels, input$loc_sel)
  }
  req(length(loc_levels) > 0)

  fc <- forecast_summary %>%
    filter(target == input$target_sel, origin_date == as.Date(input$origin_sel))

  fc <- fc %>%
    filter(location_name %in% loc_levels) %>%
    mutate(location_name = factor(location_name, levels = loc_levels))

  truth <- truth_raw %>%
    filter(target == input$target_sel)

  truth <- truth %>%
    filter(location_name %in% loc_levels) %>%
    mutate(location_name = factor(location_name, levels = loc_levels))

  origin_date <- as.Date(input$origin_sel)
  truth <- truth %>% filter(truth_date >= (origin_date - 180))

  n_loc <- length(loc_levels)
  ncol_facets <- max(1, min(4, ceiling(sqrt(n_loc))))

  panel_df <- tibble(
    location_name = factor(loc_levels, levels = loc_levels),
    x = as.Date(origin_date),
    y = 0
  )

  ggplot() +
    geom_blank(data = panel_df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
    geom_line(
      data = truth,
      aes(x = truth_date, y = value),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.45
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = fc,
      aes(x = target_end_date, ymin = q025, ymax = q975),
      fill = "#8AB6F9",
      alpha = 0.25
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = fc,
      aes(x = target_end_date, ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
      fill = "#3A7BD5",
      alpha = 0.35
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = fc,
      aes(x = target_end_date, y = median),
      color = "#1F4E8C",
      linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(origin_date), linetype = "dashed", color = "#BF360C") +
    facet_wrap(~ location_name, scales = "free_y", ncol = ncol_facets, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(input$target_sel, " prospective forecasts (origin ", input$origin_sel, ")"),
      subtitle = "Black: observed truth. Blue bands: forecast quantiles (horizons 1-4). Dashed line: origin date.",
      x = "Date",
      y = "Incidence"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
})
```
